impacts.statement: Water overtops the wire weight gage on Old Highway 20. Water is over a foot deep atop the bridge.
Water overtops the bridge on Old Highway 20.
Water reaches the bottom of the gage house.
Water is approaching homes south of downtown Courtland...with several streets impassible. Water reaches the underside of the bridge at Old Highway 20 in Courtland.
Water begins to cover roads south of downtown Courtland.
Lowland flooding begins on the left bank of the river.
The river overflows on County Road 150 about three quarters of a mile upstream of the gage site...south of Courtland.

dataAttribution.text: USGS--Water Resources of the United States
